+ University of Michigan, Dearborn, MI
Non-spin-flip (3He,t) charge-exchange and isobaric
analog states of actinide nuclei studied at 0 degrees,
E(3He)=76 MeV and 200 MeV
3He++ ions.
Source of uncertainties is probably
statistical uncertainties and estimated systematic
errors. (J.Janecke).
Approved by J. Janecke, 22 September 1999.
